title: Benchmark protocol for exoplanet forward model and retrieval
author: Baudino, Jean-Loup
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Benchmark protocol for giant exoplanet atmosphere tools, presented in Baudino et al. 2017  https://doi.org/10.3847/1538-4357/aa95be  

 The original data to reproduice the protocol are used in a jupyter notebook "Tutorial.ipynb" including all the plot routines to help to compare with you own models
steps_raw:
Benchmark protocol for giant exoplanet atmosphere tools, presented in Baudino et al. 2017  https://doi.org/10.3847/1538-4357/aa95be  

 The original data to reproduice the protocol are used in a jupyter notebook "Tutorial.ipynb" including all the plot routines to help to compare with you own models
